sources.title: Current lead for cryogenic apparatus
sources.relevance_sentence: HTS current lead configured to minimize both ohmic heating and conductive heat leak, optimizing the same two quantities CF-7 proposes to jointly qualify.

sources.title: Cryocooler cold head interface receptacle
sources.relevance_sentence: Demountable cryocooler cold-head interface with characterized per-lead heat leak (0.31 W cited), establishing long-standing prior art for heat-leak specification at a cold-head interface.

sources.title: Ceramic superconductor cryogenic current lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Early ceramic HTS current lead patent addressing heat-leak management with cryocooler-style cooling; background/blocking art for heat-leak reduction claim elements.

sources.title: Current lead for cryostat using composite high temperature superconductors
sources.relevance_sentence: Composite HTS current lead with sheath gaps filled with low-thermal-conductivity adhesive specifically to reduce heat leak into the cryostat.

sources.title: Thermally shielded superconductor current lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Low-heat-leak conduction-cooled HTS current lead system operable in persistent-current mode with intermediate thermal-anchor block tied to cryocooler first stage.

sources.title: Shuntable low loss variable current vapor cooled leads for superconductive loads
sources.relevance_sentence: Vapor-cooled lead design explicitly engineered for low heat loss; background art for heat-leak-optimization half of CF-7.

sources.title: Vapor cooled current lead for cryogenic electrical equipment
sources.relevance_sentence: Foundational vapor-cooled current lead patent with measured heat-leak reduction (~40% vs conventional), establishing old priority for measured heat-leak spec on a current lead.

sources.title_original: 高安全性低漏热高温超导大电流引线的分流器
sources.title_translation: A shunt for a high-safety, low-heat-leak HTS large-current lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Shunt for 68kA-class HTS current lead engineered so heat leak to 5K stays below ~0.2 W/kA even after loss of superconductivity, a heat-leak spec built into the component.

sources.title_original: 超電導電流リードの製造方法
sources.title_translation: Method for manufacturing superconducting current leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Manufacturing method connecting HTS conductor to support member via conductive resin; process-adjacent background for current-lead fabrication.

sources.title_original: 초전도 전력기기용 하이브리드 냉각장치
sources.title_translation: Hybrid cooling device for superconducting power equipment
sources.relevance_sentence: Hybrid cooling device (LN2 supply/circulation) for superconducting power equipment; system-level background, indirect relevance (hybrid not pure conduction-cooled).

sources.title_original: 전도 냉각 방식 초전도 회전기
sources.relevance_sentence: PCT filing for conduction-cooled superconducting rotating machine with cryocooler; system-level conduction-cooling background, not lead-specific.

Fujikura markets a 12mm non-copper-stabilizer 2G HTS tape variant explicitly for current-lead/low-thermal-conducting applications, showing an assignee-watch company already commercializes the heat-leak-vs-current tradeoff component.

sources.title: Design of a Termination for the HTS Power Cable
sources.relevance_sentence: Establishes 'termination' as an integrated multi-function assembly (current lead + joint + thermal boundary) in HTS cable art, conceptually close to CF-7's lead/termination framing though in the cable rather than magnet-coil domain.

sources.title: Partially-insulated HTS coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Partially-insulated/no-insulation-adjacent HTS coil patent family in the immediate NI-HTS-coil neighborhood this project tracks.

sources.title: Cold Performance Tests of the ITER 68 kA HTS Current Lead Prototypes
sources.relevance_sentence: Single most relevant hit: describes an integrated cold-performance qualification campaign combining joint-resistance testing and heat-conduction (heat-leak) testing on the same current-lead prototype before series production.

sources.title: Mock-up qualification and prototype manufacture for ITER current leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Describes the 2013 mock-up qualification program (7 mock-ups) for ITER HTS current leads validating design/manufacturing process before series production, institutionalizing combined test-item qualification.

sources.title: Optimal Design and Test of the 68 kA HTS Current Lead for ITER at CASIPP
sources.relevance_sentence: Overlapping design+test paper from the CASIPP program corroborating combined thermal-electrical test scope for ITER HTS current leads.

sources.title: Current Leads, Links and Buses
sources.author: A. Ballarino, CERN
sources.relevance_sentence: Authoritative review of current-lead physics giving standard heat-inleak benchmark figures (~47 W/kA at 4.2K for optimized conduction-cooled lead) for G-PHYS cross-reference.

sources.title: Numerical Model for Conduction-Cooled Current Lead Heat Loads
sources.relevance_sentence: Numerical/analytical heat-load model specific to conduction-cooled current leads, directly on-point background for CF-7's heat-leak-modeling methodology.

sources.title: Development of vapor-cooled HTS-copper 6-kA current lead incorporating operation in the current-sharing mode
sources.relevance_sentence: Hybrid vapor-cooled/HTS lead development paper reporting heat-leak reduction data, background art for heat-leak optimization.

sources.title: Thermodynamic optimization of conduction-cooled HTS current leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Early thermodynamic-optimization paper for conduction-cooled HTS leads, foundational background for physics of any CF-7 heat-leak spec derivation.

sources.title: HTS Joint Resistance for High-Field Magnets: Experiment and Temperature-Dependent Modeling
sources.journal: Journal of Superconductivity and Novel Magnetism
sources.relevance_sentence: Combines experimental joint-resistance measurement with temperature-dependent modeling for HTS joints in high-field magnets, directly on-point for the joint/contact resistance half of CF-7's co-qual concept.

sources.title: Study on the electrical performances of soldered joints between HTS coated-conductors
sources.relevance_sentence: Joint-resistance QC testing methodology for REBCO lap joints applied during coil fabrication and incoming-conductor QC, process precedent for joint resistance as manufacturing acceptance criterion.

sources.title: SELFIE: ITER superconducting joint test facility
sources.relevance_sentence: Dedicated joint-resistance QC test facility for production-proof-sample quality control of ITER superconducting joints, showing electrical-only joint QC as an established independent discipline that CF-7 must distinguish from by combining with heat-leak qualification.

sources.title: Fabrication and installation of the Mu2e cryogenic distribution system / Mu2e Technical Design Report splice qualification
sources.relevance_sentence: Describes a GTAW splice-joint qualification protocol (8 splices tested at LHe temp to 10kA), electrical/mechanical qualification precedent for superconducting joints generally.

sources.title: Cryocooler cooled HTS current lead for a 35kJ/7kW-class high-Tc SMES system
sources.relevance_sentence: Cryocooler-cooled (no cryogen bath) HTS current lead for an SMES system, directly on-theme conduction-cooled/no-cryogen background art; recommend closer read for explicit combined test-record language.

sources.title: Optimized design and performance test of 16 kA HTS current leads used for fusion HTS magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Recent (2025) design+test paper for fusion-relevant HTS current leads; postdates most patent priority dates in this space, recommend close follow-up read as possible current state-of-the-art reference.

sources.title_original: 高温超電導電流リード
sources.relevance_sentence: General technical glossary confirming HTS current-lead / conduction-cooled magnet terminology and standard heat-leak-vs-resistivity problem statement in Japanese technical literature.

sources.title: CryoSaver(TM) Current Leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Commercial HTS current-lead product line marketed on low-heat-leak performance; commercial-embodiment background.

sources.title: Superconducting & Vapor Cooled Current Leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Notes >450 units delivered to CERN, GSI, ENEA, SuperNode, evidence that vapor-cooled/superconducting current leads with established test records are a mature commercial product category.

sources.title: Intelligent current lead device and operational methods thereof
sources.assignee: IBM (per Justia cross-listing, unconfirmed via direct patent text - gap)
sources.relevance_sentence: Intelligent current lead with apparent sensor/monitoring/operational-method framing, potentially relevant if CF-7 embodiments extend to integrated sensing/certification data; flagged for dedicated full-text pull before G-NOVEL relies on it.

sources.title: Superconducting Motor with Spoke-Supported Rotor Windings
sources.relevance_sentence: Anchor exemplar's own patent: rotating cryocooler cold end through hollow driveshaft with radial thermally conductive straps to rotor shell -- essentially CF-5's proposed mechanism disclosed by the anchor company itself.

sources.title: Superconducting motor with reduced coil stress
sources.assignee: unconfirmed (likely Hinetics, claim language matches T1-01 family)
sources.relevance_sentence: Flexible radial thermal straps accommodating cooldown thermal contraction on same rotating radial-strap heat path as the Hinetics spoke-rotor patent.

sources.title_original: 旋转参考系中的冷却系统
sources.title_translation: Cooling system in a rotating reference frame
sources.relevance_sentence: Mounts the cryocooler cold head itself in the rotating frame to avoid cryogenic rotary joints, a direct alternate mechanism CF-5 must be distinguished from.

sources.title_translation: Superconducting device with a cooling unit for a rotating superconducting coil
sources.relevance_sentence: Cold head rotates inside rotor with a stationary compressor and ferrofluid gas coupling as the sole mechanical connection across the rotating interface -- an early minimize-the-interface architecture.

sources.title: Superconductor rotor cooling system
sources.assignee: American Superconductor Corp / Reliance Electric Co
sources.relevance_sentence: Stationary cryocooler bridged to a rotating device via interleaved stationary/rotating copper fins across a gap, avoiding a fluid rotary seal -- near-scope structural precedent.

sources.title: Cooling system for HTS machines
sources.relevance_sentence: High-speed fans (10-30k rpm) in the rotating frame circulate helium via density-driven centrifugal circulation, coupled to stationary cryocoolers via ferrofluidic rotary seals.

sources.title: HTS superconducting rotating machine
sources.relevance_sentence: Explicitly teaches keeping the cryocooler stationary to avoid gravity-induced heat-transfer problems of a rotating cold head, using a rotary coupling for the closed rotating loop instead.

sources.title: Cryocooler and rotary joint
sources.relevance_sentence: Compressor stationary / expander rotating with a staged intermediate-pressure working-gas seal, applied to a superconducting wind-power generator rotor.

sources.title: Cryo-rotary joint
sources.assignee: Tokyo University of Marine Science and Technology (NUC) / Kitano Seiki Co., Ltd.
sources.relevance_sentence: Compact cryo-rotary joint using a magnetic-fluid seal positioned to minimize parasitic heat leak into the refrigerant path -- close precedent for any refrigerant-transfer rotating-interface embodiment.

sources.title: Cooling structure of superconducting motor
sources.relevance_sentence: Routes LN2 through grooves on the outer surface of the rotating shaft rather than center-drilling; cryogen-based not conduction-cooled, but relevant shaft-routing geometry precedent.

sources.title_original: 一种基于传导冷却的超导电机的制冷系统
sources.title_translation: A conduction-cooling-based superconducting motor refrigeration system
sources.relevance_sentence: HIGH PRIORITY, hurts candidate: rotating two-stage cold head plus copper/aluminum thermal straps to the SC magnet with a rotary helium seal, near-identical to a rotating-cold-head embodiment of CF-5.

sources.title_original: 전도 냉각 방식 초전도 회전기
sources.assignee: Hyundai Heavy Industries Co., Ltd. (now HD Hyundai Heavy Industries)
sources.relevance_sentence: HIGH PRIORITY, hurts candidate: 3-stage GM cryocooler mounted inside the rotor with copper elements shortening the conduction path to the SC wire, filed a decade before Hinetics' architecture.

sources.title_original: 초전도 회전기용 다단 구조를 갖는 자성유체 실링 장치
sources.title_translation: Multi-stage magnetic-fluid sealing device for a superconducting rotating machine
sources.assignee: likely Hyundai Heavy Industries (unconfirmed, companion to WO2013133487A1)
sources.relevance_sentence: Multi-stage ferrofluidic seal for a hollow rotating shaft housing a cold rod, adjacent rotary-seal detail to the Hyundai conduction-cooled rotor mechanism.

sources.title: Synchronous machine having cryogenic gas transfer coupling to rotor with super-conducting coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Cryogenic gas transfer joint from a stationary cryorefrigerator through a stationary bayonet into a rotating tube -- alternate transfer-across-interface mechanism.

sources.title: Cryogenic rotary transfer coupling for superconducting electromechanical machine
sources.relevance_sentence: Dedicated cryogenic rotary transfer coupling patent, core rotary-interface hardware directly in CF-5's problem space.

sources.title: Superconducting rotor for an electrical machine
sources.relevance_sentence: Early-generation superconducting rotor general architecture, background art bracketing the baseline rotor-cooling problem.

sources.title: Superconducting rotor
sources.relevance_sentence: General superconducting rotor background art from the pre-cryocooler-conduction era.

sources.title: Cryogenic cooling system for rotor having a high temperature super-conducting field winding
sources.relevance_sentence: Evaporative cryogen cooling with a recondensing cryorefrigerator in the vapor space, a cryogen-bath/cryocooler hybrid bracketing background art distinguishable from CF-5's cryogen-free target.

sources.title: Superconducting rotor with cooling system
sources.relevance_sentence: Addresses complexity of multi-cylindrical cryogenic flow-channel rotor structures, simplification-adjacent background art.

sources.title: High-temperature superconducting rotating machine equipped with fixed-type rotor cryostat for cryogen and stator cooling structure using of vaporized cryogen from rotor
sources.relevance_sentence: Fixed (non-rotating) rotor cryostat using boiled-off cryogen to also cool the stator, adjacent but structurally distinct cryogen-bath architecture; needs manual re-pull (image-PDF blocked parsing).

sources.title_original: 도전성 물질로 함침된 무절연 초전도 코일 및 그의 제조장치
sources.title_translation: No-insulation superconducting coil impregnated with conductive material, and manufacturing apparatus therefor
sources.relevance_sentence: NI coil thermal/electrical interface engineering, not rotating-frame-specific but touches the NI-winding half of CF-5's compound claim scope.

sources.title: A Spoke-Supported Superconducting Rotor With Rotating Cryocooler
sources.journal: IEEE Transactions on Magnetics, vol. 58, no. 8
sources.relevance_sentence: Academic parent publication of the Hinetics spoke-rotor patent family; useful for enablement and public-disclosure-date checks against the patent priority date.

sources.title: Rotating Cryocooler Performance for Superconducting Rotor
sources.relevance_sentence: Follow-on experimental characterization of rotating-cryocooler performance in the same architecture family as the Hinetics spoke-rotor patent.

sources.title: Design and Analysis of Rotor Structure Support for Spoke Type Superconducting Motor
sources.relevance_sentence: Further structural follow-on in the spoke-supported rotor family, background/enablement art.

sources.title: High Temperature Superconducting Motor Cooled by On-Board Cryocooler
sources.relevance_sentence: Earlier-generation on-board rotating cryocooler HTS motor demonstration, predating Hinetics by well over a decade.

sources.title: Rotating Cryocooler for Superconducting Motor
sources.relevance_sentence: Stirling coaxial pulse-tube cryocooler mounted in physical/thermal contact with an HTS rotor and rotated together on an 1800 rpm mock-up; early demonstrated rotating-cold-head mechanism.

sources.title: Cryogenic Rotary Joints Applied to the Cooling of Superconducting Rotating Machinery
sources.relevance_sentence: Introduces the 'Gas Blow Coupling' non-contact thermal coupling across a narrow gap, a strong different-mechanism NPL reference for a G-CLAIM design-around away from solid-strap conduction.

sources.title: Noncontact High-Torque Magnetic Coupler for Superconducting Rotating Machines
sources.relevance_sentence: Non-contact torque transfer isolating the cold rotating mass from the warm shaft, adjacent mechanical-isolation background art (not itself a heat-extraction mechanism).

sources.title: Cooling of Superconducting Motors on Aircraft
sources.relevance_sentence: Review-level survey of aviation HTS motor cooling including rotor cryocooling architectures; full text blocked (HTTP 403) on fetch, retried once, captured from snippet metadata only -- flagged for manual re-pull.

sources.title: Cooling method for the rotor of a superconducting motor
sources.relevance_sentence: Directly on-topic title; full text blocked (HTTP 403) on fetch, retried once, still blocked -- content unverified past the title.

sources.title: Additive manufacturing materials for structural optimisation and cooling enhancement of superconducting motors in cryo-electric aircraft
sources.relevance_sentence: Adjacent structural/thermal-materials background for cryo-electric aircraft motors, not rotating-interface-specific, lower direct relevance.

sources.title: Cooling System Technologies on Superconducting Rotating Machines / Rotating Vacuum Heat Transfer, Rotating Cryocoolers, Slip Rings, Rotating Bearings, Ball Bearings
sources.relevance_sentence: HIGH PRIORITY follow-up: a dedicated 2024 book with chapters titled almost exactly on CF-5's problem statement; likely the richest available NPL survey source, not independently pulled past title/TOC (paywalled).

sources.title_original: 转子、电机和用电设备
sources.status: unconfirmed, excluded from IDS_pool as off-scope
sources.relevance_sentence: Conventional (non-superconducting) EV motor rotor cooling-channel patent; keyword-overlap noise hit, not superconducting/cryogenic, excluded from IDS_pool.

sources.title: Non-destructive measurement method and apparatus for the turn-to-turn resistivity distribution in non-insulation superconducting coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Discloses measuring the spatial turn-to-turn resistivity distribution (TTRD) inside an NI HTS coil non-destructively -- the conduction map CF-3 proposes to act upon -- but appears to stop at measurement, not active steering.

sources.title_original: 高温超导体场线圈
sources.relevance_sentence: Selectively removes conductive cladding from HTS tape edges in a spatially-graded way to keep I/Ic approximately constant across coil regions, a passive geometry-engineered analog of steering current away from over-stressed regions (field-profile-driven, not cooling-path-driven).

sources.title: No-insulation multi-width winding for high temperature superconducting magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Varies HTS tape width turn-by-turn to equalize I/Ic and steer current density across the coil, a fixed-at-winding-time (not actively controlled, not thermally-mapped) current-steering mechanism.

sources.title: High-Temperature Superconducting Coil Having Smart Insulation, High-Temperature Superconducting Wire Used Therefor, and Manufacturing Method Therefor
sources.relevance_sentence: Metal-insulator-transition material layer between turns is insulating at operating temperature and becomes conductive above a transition temperature, an intrinsic materials-physics analog of temperature-triggered current bypass without an externally measured spatial thermal map.

sources.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
sources.title: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
sources.relevance_sentence: Discloses an active PI feedback controller adjusting the bulk external power-supply current of an NI HTS magnet based on measured-vs-reference global field -- active current control of an NI magnet is already claimed, though as a single global knob, not spatial/turn-level redistribution driven by a thermal-conduction map.

sources.title: Partially-insulated HTS coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Insulating layer between turns has spatially-staggered conductive windows creating deliberate, geometrically-placed current paths of controlled resistance -- the closest architectural match found for engineering turn-to-turn bypass sites at specific spatial locations to control current distribution and local heating.

sources.title: HTS Linked Partial Insulation for HTS Field Coils
sources.relevance_sentence: HTS 'bridges' placed at specific spatial locations self-regulate as current limiters so faster-quenching regions push current toward slower-quenching (cooler) regions -- functionally close to redirecting current away from thermally weak spots, but reactive/self-regulating via local Tc physics rather than driven by a known cold-head conduction map.

sources.title: Superconducting coil module
sources.relevance_sentence: A heating device imposes a customized, spatially-varying temperature profile across the coil to equalize critical current and suppress screening-current-field effects -- an engineered thermal map used to shape coil electromagnetic behavior, though heater-imposed and SCF-focused rather than cooling-path-driven and hot-spot-focused.

sources.venue: PMC / IEEE Trans. Applied Superconductivity / MIT DSpace
sources.title: Hot-Spot Modeling of REBCO NI Pancake Coil: Analytical and Experimental Approaches
sources.relevance_sentence: Analytical/experimental hot-spot temperature modeling in NI pancake coils; foundational background physics for predicting where hot spots form.

sources.title: Control of turn-to-turn contact resistivity in resistively insulated REBCO coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Title directly suggests engineered/active control of turn-to-turn contact resistivity, closely adjacent to CF-3's mechanism; full text not machine-readable this session (gap, needs re-fetch).

sources.title: Explicit Turn Resolution with Anisotropic Homogenisation for Efficient 3D Magneto-Thermal Finite-Element Simulation of Large-Scale No-Insulation HTS Magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Simulation-tool background for predicting current redistribution in NI coils; not itself a steering mechanism.

sources.title: Surface Contact Approximation for Magneto-Thermal Finite Element Analysis of No-Insulation HTS Coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Simulation methodology for magneto-thermal contact behavior in NI coils; background modeling capability.

sources.title: Electromagnetic-thermal-mechanical characteristics with active feedback control in a high-temperature superconducting no-insulation magnet
sources.relevance_sentence: Physics/safety analysis of the same PI active feedback control family as CF3-005 (global, not spatial, current control).

sources.title: Determining Operating Current of No-insulation Field Coil in HTS Generators
sources.relevance_sentence: Addresses appropriate operating current given turn-to-turn bypass behavior; adjacent background art.

sources.title: Current Bypassing and Transient Stability in a Partially Insulated HTS Coil
sources.relevance_sentence: Documents current bypassing behavior in partially-insulated coils under transient conditions; establishes NPL literature on bypass-site behavior independent of the Tokamak Energy patent family.

sources.title: Electromagnetic behaviour and thermal stability of a conduction-cooled, no-insulated 2G-HTS coil at intermediate temperatures
sources.relevance_sentence: Directly on point for CF-3's physical operating regime (conduction-cooled + NI coil + thermal stability); core background/comparator art, does not itself claim active spatial current steering.

sources.title: Turn-to-Turn Contact Resistance Measurement of No-Insulation REBCO Pancake Coil: External Field Dependence
sources.relevance_sentence: Measurement methodology background corroborating CF3-001's (US12,196,792) territory.

sources.title: Experimental and numerical study on current distribution in parallel co-wound no-insulation coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Documents non-uniform current distribution among co-wound tapes; background phenomenon, no steering claim identified.

sources.title: Superconducting magnet apparatus and control method thereof
sources.relevance_sentence: Bulk on/off switch (bellows/gas-pressure or shape-memory-alloy) for external power to a superconducting coil; low relevance to turn-level thermal-map-based steering, logged for candor because it surfaced under the active-control query cluster and touches temperature-responsive switching.

sources.title_original: Rare earth barium copper oxide magnet coils and methods
sources.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
sources.relevance_sentence: Already claims engineered resistive/interlayer coatings to control turn-to-turn Rc and reports both thermal-cycling and mechanical-cycling Rc-degradation data, directly overlapping CF-6's target phenomenon though not framed as CTE-matching or as a cryogen-free-vs-bath comparison.
sources.abstract_original: REBCO tape with thin resistive coating layers (copper oxide, Cr, Ni, or Ni-P) and REBCO tapes with stainless-steel interlayers (Ni or Cu plated) to control turn-to-turn contact resistivity (Rc); thermal cycling 4.2K->273K increases Rc from ~0.8 to ~3.1 microOhm-cm^2 (does not reset to as-built value); mechanical/pressure cycling (~1000 cycles, 2.5-25 MPa) decreases Rc to ~1/10 of initial value.
query_terms_that_found_it: CTE matched interlayer no-insulation HTS coil conduction cooled patent
SuperPower no-insulation REBCO coil patent US

sources.title_original: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
sources.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
sources.relevance_sentence: Same assignee/family as CF6-T1-1; controls Rc effects via feedback rather than interface material engineering, lower direct overlap but included for family/assignee-watch candor.
sources.abstract_original: Active feedback controller for NI HTS magnet power supply to reduce/eliminate charging delay and linearize magnet constant; models Rc as lumped parallel resistor (~3.5 mOhm estimated); tested at 77K with design consideration for 4.2K.
query_terms_that_found_it: SuperPower no-insulation REBCO coil patent US

sources.title_original: Partially-insulated HTS coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Same problem space (turn-to-turn Rc engineering) via a phase-transition-material mechanism rather than CTE-matched/compliant interlayer; adjacent but not anticipating art, must remain in IDS_pool.
sources.abstract_original: Metal-insulator-transition material (e.g. vanadium oxide) between turns with resistance changing >=10x around ~110K, giving temperature-dependent turn-to-turn Rc control distinct from cooldown/cycling-fatigue-dependent control.
query_terms_that_found_it: CTE matched interlayer no-insulation HTS coil conduction cooled patent

sources.relevance_sentence: Addresses mechanical robustness of the NI interface via conductive-composite fill, adjacent to but materially different from a CTE-matched or spring-loaded compliant interlayer, and does not explicitly address thermal-cycling fatigue.
sources.abstract_original: 무절연 초전도 코일 권선시 도전성 입자를 함침하여 턴간 저항을 유지하면서 기계적 강도를 보강 (per fetched summary).

sources.abstract_original: 通过在线圈绕制后对HTS带材轴向边缘进行材料去除（机械加工/放电加工/激光切割或化学方法），缩减带材轴向范围并改变绕组间电气特性，暴露缓冲层作为匈间绝缘（'缓冲层绝缘'，BLI），无需额外绝缘材料即可实现匈间绝缘/电气特性调节。
sources.abstract_translation: Describes removing conductive cladding (Cu/Ag) from the tape's axial edges after winding to expose the buffer-layer stack, creating a Buffer-Layer-Insulator (BLI) turn-to-turn interface without adding separate insulation material; targeted at tokamak TF coils, aerospace, MRI, accelerators.
